final_text:
{
  "project_name": "Loan Management System",
  "backend_architecture": "Microservices architecture using Node.js, with PostgreSQL as the database and AWS API Gateway for API management. OAuth 2.0 is used for authentication.",
  "services": [
    "User Management Service",
    "Loan Application Service",
    "Loan Processing Service",
    "Payment Processing Service"
  ],
  "controllers": [
    "UserController",
    "LoanController",
    "PaymentController"
  ],
  "entities": [
    "User",
    "Loan",
    "Payment"
  ],
  "repositories": [
    "UserRepository",
    "LoanRepository",
    "PaymentRepository"
  ],
  "apis": [
    "/api/users",
    "/api/loans",
    "/api/payments"
  ],
  "validation_rules": [
    "User registration validation",
    "Loan application validation",
    "Payment processing validation"
  ],
  "security_implementation": [
    "HTTPS for secure communication",
    "OAuth 2.0 for authentication",
    "Encryption at rest and in transit"
  ],
  "error_handling": [
    "Custom error handling middleware",
    "Logging of errors for monitoring and debugging"
  ],
  "developer_notes": [
    "API documentation and codebase access provided",
    "Use of environment variables for configuration",
    "Implement CI/CD pipeline for deployment"
  ]
}
